1.title: Senior Developer
1.Description:
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy .NET Framework application and a modern .NET Core microservices backend with a React frontend.
● Develop and test a new AI-assisted insurance platform using Azure MSAL for authentication, Azure Cosmos DB, and Azure Blob Storage, built with Claude Code as the primary AI-assisted development tool.
● Provide technical governance by reviewing the architecture and code contributions of peer Senior Developers to ensure system reliability and alignment with SOLID principles.
● Manage cloud infrastructure across AWS and Azure, including AWS API Gateway orchestration and Azure-based authentication/storage services, with CI/CD via GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline/CodeCommit.
● Led the migration of the legacy codebase from SVN to GitHub and actively guide Agile ceremonies — stand-ups, backlog grooming, and sprint refinements — to maintain high delivery velocity.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable backend solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.
● Contributed to a Vue 3 migration for a global contingent workforce system, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed bug fixes and feature enhancements for an enterprise supply chain management system using C#, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript (ES6+), maintaining high code quality and system stability.
● Maintained and optimized client databases in SQL Server and Oracle DB, authoring queries and stored procedures to ensure data integrity and performance.
● Managed source code versioning and branching strategies using Azure DevOps, TFS, and Git.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed and maintained internal web applications using ASP.NET, C#, and Angular supporting a global professional-services firm's audit and advisory practice operations.
● Built and optimized database stored procedures and complex SQL queries using Oracle PL/SQL and SQL Server to support financial reporting and data management requirements.
● Utilized Azure DevOps for source control, branch management, code reviews, and CI/CD pipeline execution.

1.title: Application Specialist
1.Description:
● Developed and launched the 'Accounting Integrated Management System' (AIMS), fully digitizing the procurement lifecycle for 100+ internal users.
● Reduced manual financial processing errors by 40% through automated validation logic and optimized SQL stored procedures.
● Built custom internal tools using C# WinForms to automate repetitive operational workflows for the engineering department.

1.title: Information Technology Specialist
1.Description:
● Built a Traffic Violation Management System using C# MVC .NET Framework, Xamarin, and SQL Server, including an Android electronic ticketing module with thermal printer integration.
● Developed a drowsiness detection system using Python, OpenCV, and Raspberry Pi for real-time facial and eye tracking, paired with an Arduino-based wristband for telemetry reporting.
● Led front-end and back-end development for a web application using Agile methodology, coordinating with a cross-functional team to meet client milestones.

0.Title: Higher Education Digital Transformation Ecosystem
